data.name: Academic AI Assistant Home Description
data.value: A student-focused workspace for reading research PDFs, writing academic drafts, checking citations, comparing similarity, and exploring knowledge links.

data.name: Demo-ready modules description
data.value: PDF library, rule-based analysis, citation checking, similarity checking, knowledge graph, and chat with PDF are organized in one MVC application.

data.name: PDF Reading Assistant description
data.value: Upload PDFs, extract text, generate summaries, and chat with document content.

data.name: Writing Feedback Studio description
data.value: Analyze essays for thesis, structure, tone, logic, citation, and overall score.

data.name: Citation & Similarity Checker description
data.value: Check basic APA citation quality and compare essays with extracted documents.

data.name: Knowledge Graph description
data.value: Visualize relationships between documents, essays, and extracted keywords.

data.name: Dashboard subtitle
data.value: Here is your academic reading and writing workspace.

data.name: No recent activities yet. Start by uploading a PDF or analyzing an essay.
data.value: No recent activities yet. Start by uploading a PDF or analyzing an essay.

data.name: Document Library subtitle
data.value: Manage your uploaded PDF research documents.

data.name: You have not uploaded any PDF documents yet.
data.value: You have not uploaded any PDF documents yet.

data.name: Writing Studio subtitle
data.value: Analyze an essay, literature review, thesis proposal, or research report.

data.name: Please extract text first before chatting with this PDF.
data.value: Please extract text first before chatting with this PDF.

data.name: Upload_SelectPdf
data.value: Please select a PDF file to upload.

data.name: Upload_PdfTooLarge
data.value: PDF file size must be less than 10MB.

data.name: Upload_InvalidPdfFile
data.value: Invalid PDF file. The uploaded file does not appear to be a real PDF.

data.name: Upload_SelectImage
data.value: Please select an image file to upload.

data.name: Upload_OnlyImagesAllowed
data.value: Only JPG, JPEG, and PNG images are allowed.

data.name: Upload_ImageTooLarge
data.value: Image file size must be less than 5MB.

data.name: Upload_InvalidImageFile
data.value: Invalid image file. The uploaded file does not appear to be a real image.

data.name: Upload_PdfHint
data.value: Allowed file type: PDF. Maximum size: 10MB.

data.name: Upload_ImageHint
data.value: Allowed file types: JPG, JPEG, PNG. Maximum size: 5MB.

data.name: Login_TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {0} minutes.

data.name: Login_SecurityNotice
data.value: For security reasons, repeated failed login attempts may temporarily lock sign-in.

data.name: DevTools_Description
data.value: This page is only available in Development. Reset Demo Data will delete and recreate demo records for demo accounts only.

data.name: DevTools_Warning
data.value: Reset Demo Data only affects demo records for demo@student.com. It does not delete real user data.

data.name: DevTools_ResetConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset demo data?

data.name: DevTools_ResetSuccess
data.value: Demo data has been reset successfully.

data.name: DevTools_ResetError
data.value: Could not reset demo data. Please check the application logs.

data.name: NewPasswordMinLength
data.value: New password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Profile_Subtitle
data.value: View your account information and activity summary.

data.name: EmptyDocumentsTitle
data.value: You do not have any documents yet.

data.name: EmptyDocumentsDescription
data.value: Upload your first PDF to get started.

data.name: EmptyEssaysTitle
data.value: You do not have any essays yet.

data.name: EmptyEssaysDescription
data.value: Start your first essay to receive academic feedback.

data.name: OCR History subtitle
data.value: Review images you scanned and reuse extracted text.

data.name: EmptyOcrTitle
data.value: You do not have any OCR scans yet.

data.name: EmptyOcrDescription
data.value: Upload an image with text to extract content.

data.name: EmptyTextScansTitle
data.value: You do not have any text scans yet.

data.name: EmptyTextScansDescription
data.value: Paste text to check internal similarity.

data.name: EmptyWritingCoachTitle
data.value: You do not have any writing coach sessions yet.

data.name: EmptyWritingCoachDescription
data.value: Use AI Writing Coach to brainstorm ideas, build outlines, or improve your thesis.

data.name: References subtitle
data.value: Manage sources and generate basic APA/MLA citations.

data.name: EmptyReferencesTitle
data.value: You do not have any references yet.

data.name: EmptyReferencesDescription
data.value: Add your first source to generate citations.

data.name: NoRecentActivitiesDescription
data.value: Start by uploading a PDF or analyzing an essay.

data.name: OCR Scanner subtitle
data.value: Upload an image or screenshot containing text. The system will extract readable text using OCR.

data.name: OCR Details subtitle
data.value: OCR scan details and extracted text.

data.name: OCR Missing Image
data.value: The image file is missing from the server.

data.name: Text Similarity Scan subtitle
data.value: Check internal similarity against your uploaded documents, previous essays, and OCR scans.

data.name: Text Scan Info Notice
data.value: This feature checks similarity against your uploaded documents, previous essays, and OCR scans only. It does not scan the Internet.

data.name: Text Scan Minimum Words Help
data.value: Enter at least 50 words for a meaningful scan.

data.name: Text Scan Result Notice
data.value: Similarity does not always mean plagiarism. This tool only detects text overlap with your internal database.

data.name: AI Writing Coach subtitle
data.value: Get help with brainstorming, outlining, thesis improvement, and counter-arguments.

data.name: Additional Instructions Placeholder
data.value: Add context, requirements, or ideas you already have.

data.name: Writing Coach Notice
data.value: This module guides your thinking and structure. It does not write the entire essay for you.

data.name: Create Reference subtitle
data.value: Enter source information to generate APA/MLA citations.

data.name: Edit Reference subtitle
data.value: Update source information and regenerate APA/MLA citations.

data.name: UploadDocument_Subtitle
data.value: Add a research document to your library.

data.name: Writing_ContentHelp
data.value: Paste your draft here. Feedback uses AI when enabled, otherwise it falls back to rule-based analysis.

data.name: Documents_PdfMissingOnServer
data.value: The PDF file no longer exists on the server.

data.name: Documents_ExtractBeforeSummary
data.value: Please extract text before generating a summary.

data.name: TextScan_OcrNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: OCR scan not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: TextScan_EssayNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: Essay not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: TextScan_NoOcrTextAvailable
data.value: No OCR text available to scan.

data.name: TextScan_MinimumWordsValidation
data.value: Please enter at least 50 words for a meaningful scan.

data.name: Writing_ReferenceNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: Reference not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: Writing_CoachSessionNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: Writing coach session not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: Writing_NoCoachResponseAvailable
data.value: No writing coach response available to send to Writing Studio.

data.name: Writing_OcrNotFoundOrForbidden
data.value: OCR scan not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: Writing_NoExtractedTextAvailable
data.value: No extracted text available to send to Writing Studio.

data.name: Writing_CompleteRequiredFields
data.value: Please complete the essay title, type, and content before analyzing.

data.name: Writing_AiFeedbackFallback
data.value: AI feedback unavailable. Rule-based feedback generated.

data.name: WritingCoach_AiResponseSuccess
data.value: Writing coach response generated by AI.

data.name: WritingCoach_AiResponseFallback
data.value: AI unavailable. A rule-based writing guide was generated.

data.name: Validation_FullNameMaxLength
data.value: Your full name must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: Validation_EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Validation_EmailMaxLength
data.value: Your email must be 150 characters or fewer.

data.name: Validation_PasswordMinLength
data.value: The password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Validation_PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: The confirmation password does not match.

data.name: Validation_TitleMaxLength200
data.value: The title must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: Validation_EssayContentMinLength
data.value: The content is too short to analyze.

data.name: Validation_WritingCoachModeRequired
data.value: Please select a writing coach mode.

data.name: Validation_TopicMaxLength
data.value: The topic must be 300 characters or fewer.

data.name: Validation_WritingCoachTopicOrInstructionsRequired
data.value: Please enter a topic or additional instructions.

data.name: Validation_WritingCoachThesisRequired
data.value: Please enter a thesis statement to improve.

data.name: Validation_WritingCoachThesisOrArgumentRequired
data.value: Please enter a thesis statement or main argument.

data.name: Validation_ReferenceTitleMaxLength
data.value: The reference title must be 300 characters or fewer.

data.name: Validation_ReferenceAuthorMaxLength
data.value: The author field must be 300 characters or fewer.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: Register_PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: PdfNotExists
data.value: The PDF file no longer exists on the server.

data.name: ExtractTextBeforeSummary
data.value: Please extract text before generating a summary.

data.name: ReferenceNotFound
data.value: Reference not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: WritingCoachSessionNotFound
data.value: Writing coach session not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: WritingCoachNoResponse
data.value: No writing coach response available to send to Writing Studio.

data.name: OcrScanNotFound
data.value: OCR scan not found or you do not have permission to access it.

data.name: OcrNoExtractedText
data.value: No extracted text available to send to Writing Studio.

data.name: EssayFieldsRequired
data.value: Please complete the essay title, type, and content before analyzing.

data.name: EssayAnalyzeFallback
data.value: AI feedback unavailable. Rule-based feedback generated.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Error404Message
data.value: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

data.name: Error500Message
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: References_ExportSubtitle
data.value: Copy APA or MLA reference lists into your writing.

data.name: OCRNoTextTitle
data.value: We couldn't detect readable text in this image.

data.name: OCRNoTextTipQuality
data.value: Use a clearer or higher-resolution image.

data.name: OCRNoTextTipBlur
data.value: Make sure the text is not blurred or heavily tilted.

data.name: OCRNoTextTipContrast
data.value: Try an image with stronger contrast.
